content: Docker Compose profiles: services without profiles attribute always start. Services with profiles only start when that profile is active. Command: docker compose --profile platform up -d. Profile assignment in YAML: profiles: [platform]. CRITICAL DEPENDENCY BEHAVIOR: if service A (no profile) depends_on service B (has profile), then B will also start when A starts. Conversely if B depends_on A and B has profile=platform, B only starts when platform profile is active. Services in same profile start together.
